nodes.label: File Icon SVG
nodes.description: A 16x16 generic document/file icon SVG. Shows a folded-corner page outline (dog-ear top-right) with three horizontal lines representing text content. Rendered in grey (#666) with no fill background. Typical static asset used in Next.js public directory.

nodes.label: Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone - Book Cover
nodes.author: J.K. Rowling
nodes.norm_label: harry potter and the philosopher's stone - book cover

nodes.label: Full-Stack Implementation Principle
nodes.rationale: Every task must include both frontend and backend changes together in a single spec to ensure end-to-end feature delivery without fragmented proposals.

nodes.label: Avoid Over-Engineering Principle
nodes.rationale: Keep solutions simple and only implement what is explicitly required. Avoid patterns, abstractions, or refactoring beyond the spec scope.

nodes.label: Junior-Friendly Code Principle
nodes.rationale: Code should be readable and understandable by junior developers. Clear naming, descriptive variables, and comments only for non-obvious 'why' logic.

nodes.label: Naming Conventions
nodes.rationale: All names fully spelled out, no abbreviations. Booleans prefixed with is/has/should, functions named with verbs, variables as nouns.

nodes.label: Function Extraction Rules
nodes.rationale: Only extract code into a function when the same logic is used in 2 or more places. Do not extract one-line operations or refactor for style alone.

links.note: 16x16 viewBox, fill none, single gray (#666) path, clip-path applied, no external dependencies
The SVG file contains a single compound path using fill-rule evenodd to draw the globe shape
SVG renders a globe/world icon with latitude and longitude style curves on a circular shape
Author name 'J.K. Rowling' is prominently displayed at the top of the book cover
Hagrid (large bearded figure holding a lantern and keys) is illustrated on the cover
Harry Potter (boy with round glasses and black hair, wearing a cloak) is illustrated on the cover
Publisher 'Bloomsbury' is displayed at the bottom of the book cover
Hogwarts castle is visible in the dark night-sky background of the cover illustration
SVG contains path data spelling out NEXT.JS as a wordmark logo in black on transparent background
The SVG file contains the Next.js wordmark logo as inline path data
Asset is the official Next.js logo distributed in the default Next.js project template public directory
Presence in Next.js project public folder suggests the app is deployed or associated with Vercel hosting platform
Three small 0.75r circles at top-left of window represent window control buttons (close/minimize/maximize)
SVG depicts a browser/application window frame with a title bar
The window chrome includes the three-dot traffic light pattern common in macOS/browser window UI iconography
